title: Ultimate Horseshoes
description: This mod adds Horseshoes to the game the right way!
body:
# ⚙️ CONFIGURATION
### This mod is highly configurable.

- You can set how quickly Durability drains.
- You can toggle Durability on Horse Armours.
- You can toggle Durability on Horseshoes.
- You can toggle off the Slot Lock on Horseshoes (by default, you need **Shears** to retrieve them).
- You can set each multiplier for the stats ⚡Speed | ⬆️Jump | 🛡️Armour separately, for each tier of Horseshoes. By Default, Horseshoes give no armour.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BLZDetKYL-w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# HORSESHOES TIERS
![All 5 Horseshoe Types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z4gIGraY/images/dc73a31c5248d044b696bcf4ac9fc2b936644d4b.png)
### Copper Horseshoes
_Found in chests_
- **⚡Speed:** +2 blocks per second
- **⬆️Jump:** +0.5 block height
- **⛓️‍💥Durability:** 143
### Iron Horseshoes
_Found in chests & traded by Armorers_
- **⚡Speed:** +2 blocks per second
- **⬆️Jump:** +0.5 block height
- **⛓️‍💥Durability:** 195
### Golden Horseshoes
_Found in Nether & End chests_
- **⚡Speed:** +4 blocks per second
- **⬆️Jump:** +2 blocks height
- **⛓️‍💥Durability:** 91
### Diamond Horseshoes
_Found in Ancient city chests & traded by Armorers_
- **⚡Speed:** +3 blocks per second
- **⬆️Jump:** +1 block height
- **⛓️‍💥Durability:** 429
### Netherite Horseshoes
_Upgraded with a Smithing Template like Diamond Horse Armor._
- **⚡Speed:** +3 blocks per second
- **⬆️Jump:** +1 block height
- **⛓️‍💥Durability:** 481

They are enchantable (same as Boots), so you can have Frost Walker or Depth Strider on them to help you cross water. The horse will return damage with Thorns and survive deadly falls with Feather Falling too.

They can be retrieved at any moment using **Shears**.
You need to sneak to equip & retrieve them, so it feels like real Blacksmith work!
When Durability is low, you can repair them on an anvil, use Mending holding them in your hand, or just smelt them for a nugget.

### For consistency, Horse Armours are now also enchantable but subject to Durability!
### You can however toggle off Durability in the config.

# 🐴 MOUNTS
These are all the entities that can wear Horseshoes:
- Horse
- Skeleton Horse
- Zombie Horse
- Donkey
- Mule

****
### ✨🌐 FULL LANGUAGE SUPPORT
**This mod is now translated into all 142 Minecraft languages.**
- Copper Horseshoes
- Iron Horseshoes
- Golden Horseshoes
- Diamond Horseshoes
- Netherite Horseshoes
